Preference.android:summary: Reset one-time hints & tooltips, so they will show again.
Preference.android:title: Reset hints

Preference.android:summary: Reset the problems dismissed on the Problem Solver screen
Preference.android:title: Reset dismissed problems

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Show debug info in message details
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Message debug info

Preference.android:summary: Create messages galore in contact and group chats (local only, nothing will be sent)
Preference.android:title: Create text messages

Preference.android:summary: Create messages galore with reactions/ack/dec in contact and group chats (local only, nothing will be sent)
Preference.android:title: Create messages with reactions

Preference.android:summary: A fair amount of random nonces will be created and stored
Preference.android:title: Create nonces

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: If enabled, a text message containing encoded call info will be sent in the group when a call is started.
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Send group call init

CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: If enabled the artificial delay for group call creation will be skipped and the call created immediately
CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Skip group call start delay

Preference.android:summary: View apps dynamic color and typography theme values
Preference.android:title: Open Pattern Library

Preference.android:summary: Reads all android contacts and displays them with all required information for debugging.
Preference.android:title: Show Android Contact Sync Debug Info

Preference.android:summary: Intentionally cause a crash to test error reporting
Preference.android:title: Trigger A Test Crash

Preference.android:summary: Hide the developer menu from the settings.
Preference.android:title: Remove Developer Menu
